name: Royal Knight of the Ice Barrier

desc: If this card is Tribute Summoned: Special Summon 1 "Ice Coffin Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 1000/DEF 0) in Attack Position to your opponent's field. This Token cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon.
